summary:
The input batch underwent rigorous processing through 8 scholarly protocols. Several words were split to isolate their core components and functional affixes. For instance, 'ያልወከለና' was split into 'ያልወከለ' and 'ና', 'በኦሮሚያብሔራዊ' into 'ኦሮሚያ' and 'ብሔራዊ', and 'እንደጣዖት' into 'እንደ' and 'ጣዖት'.

Visual OCR errors were corrected: 'ሰለሚገኙ' was fixed to 'ስለሚገኙ' (ሰ ➔ ስ), 'ባለቤትነ' was corrected to 'ባለቤትነት' (a scholarly guess based on common noun morphology), and 'ከመንግስቶ' was corrected to 'መንግስት' (a scholarly guess for a common noun).

Following Protocol 2 (Nonsense Removal) and Protocol 7 (Size Constraint), several words were discarded. 'በቢቩኝ', 'ከማክሰኚት', 'ድጎ', 'በእነማይ', and 'በሸበል' were deemed unfixable gibberish or too ambiguous to provide dictionary value. Additionally, single-character functional words/affixes such as 'ና' (conjunction 'and'), 'ም' (suffix 'also/even'), 'በ' (preposition 'in/by'), and 'ከ' (preposition 'from') were discarded as standalone entries per Protocol 7, which strictly filters out any word or root consisting of only a single character. Their semantic contribution was noted during the splitting process for the main words they attached to.

The input batch was processed through 8 scholarly protocols. Several words required splitting: 'እንደየተጨባጭ' was split into 'እንደየ' and 'ተጨባጭ', with 'እንደየ' discarded as a prefix-like element. 'ቀረበደራሲ' was split into 'ቀረበ' and 'ደራሲ'. 'ሻምፔኝና' became 'ሻምፔኝ', 'የርዋንዳንና' became 'ርዋንዳ', 'ልሆነና' became 'መሆን', and 'እንደጠየቁትና' became 'መጠየቅ', with the conjunction 'ና' and object marker 'ን' discarded as they do not form standalone dictionary entries in this context. 'የመስከቲርስ' was discarded as unfixable OCR noise/misspelling, and 'ኤምደብልዩ' was discarded as an acronym lacking semantic value for a general dictionary. All remaining words were corrected, lemmatized to their infinitive or base noun form, translated with comprehensive synonyms, and tagged with their major part of speech. All final entries adhere to the minimum two-character length constraint.

- 'እንቅስቅሴው' was identified as a common OCR error for 'እንቅስቃሴው' (movement, activity). The 'ስ' and 'ት' characters are frequently confused in OCR processes. The corrected form 'እንቅስቃሴው' was used for lemmatization.
- 'ለውደድር' was identified as an OCR error for 'ለውድድር' (for competition). The 'ድ' and 'ር' characters are often visually confused in OCR. The corrected form 'ለውድድር' was used for lemmatization.
- 'ራማታን', 'ጆአኩዊን', and 'ኤልካፖ' were identified as proper nouns, likely names or nicknames, and tagged as Nouns with lower general dictionary importance.

No words were discarded as unfixable gibberish or single characters. All remaining words were lemmatized, translated, and tagged with their major part of speech.

Several words required splitting from enclitics or merged nouns: 'ለመትረየስም' was split into 'ለመትረየስ' and the enclitic 'ም'; 'ሲዋረድና' into 'ሲዋረድ' and 'ና'; 'የሚታገሰውና' into 'የሚታገሰው' and 'ና'; 'ሲያጋባንና' into 'ሲያጋባን' and 'ና'; 'እንገንደሰውመኝታ' into 'እንገንደሰው' and 'መኝታ'; 'ተጋባብኝና' into 'ተጋባብኝ' and 'ና'; and 'ባቢቸቭም' into 'ባቢቸቭ' and 'ም'. The enclitics 'ም' and 'ና' were discarded as they do not function as standalone dictionary entries. All remaining words were visually repaired, lemmatized to their global citation forms (infinitives for verbs, base forms for nouns), and assigned a major part of speech. All roots are at least two characters long, adhering to the size constraint. Scholarly Guesses were made for 'ከአሏት', where the root 'አለ' can mean 'to say' or 'to be/have', and for 'አንክተው', where 'ማንከስ' can mean 'to limp' or 'to cause to limp', with the specific nuance depending on contextual usage.

summary:
The input batch underwent a rigorous 8-protocol scholarly analysis. Several words required splitting due to merged suffixes or conjunctions, including 'የሚያመላከትና' (split into 'የሚያመላክት' and 'እና'), 'እንደሚተባበሩም' (split into 'እንደሚተባበሩ' and 'ም'), 'ሠልጣኞቹና' (split into 'ሠልጣኞቹ' and 'እና'), 'እንደምውም' (split into 'እንደምው' and 'ም'), 'ከመጽሐፋቸው' (split into 'ከ' and 'መጽሐፋቸው'), 'የጋዜጠኞቹንና' (split into 'የጋዜጠኞቹን' and 'እና'), and 'የኦሺያኑስና' (split into 'የኦሺያኑስ' and 'እና').

Following Protocol 7 (The Filter), single-character words 'ም' (from 'እንደሚተባበሩም' and 'እንደምውም') were discarded as they do not meet the minimum length requirement for dictionary entries.

Visual OCR corrections (Protocol 3) were applied to several words: 'የሚያመላከትና' was corrected to 'የሚያመላክት' (fixing 'ተ' to 'ት'), 'እንደፈራችወ' to 'እንደፈራችው' (fixing 'ወ' to 'ው'), 'የመንከባክብ' to 'የመንከባከብ' (fixing 'ክብ' to 'ከብ'), 'የውድድድሩ' to 'የውድድሩ' (removing a redundant 'ድ'), and 'የተንጠለለጠለ' to 'የተንጠለጠለ' (removing a redundant 'ለ').

Scholarly Guesses (Protocol 8) were made for words exhibiting significant OCR corruption: 'እንደምውም' was interpreted and corrected to 'እንደምንም' (somehow) as the most semantically plausible Amharic adverb. 'ምዳቤያቸው' was corrected to 'ምድባቸው' (their assignment/category) to reflect a common and grammatically sound Amharic noun. 'ሺጤና' was corrected to 'ሽተኛ' (patient/sick person) as a likely misread of a common term. These corrections prioritize semantic and morphological integrity over a literal, unfixable interpretation of the raw OCR.

The input batch underwent rigorous processing. Several words required splitting: 'ለቱለማ' was split into 'ቱለማ' (preposition 'ለ' removed); 'ለከረዩ' into 'ከረዩ' (preposition 'ለ' removed); 'ከመጣሁኮ' into 'ከመጣሁ' (emphasis particle 'ኮ' removed); 'በኋላከክፍለ' into 'በኋላ' and 'ክፍል'; 'በሰከረችና' into 'በሰከረች' (conjunction 'ና' removed); 'ከተመለሰተኩሶ' into 'ከተመለሰ' and 'ተኩሶ'; 'እንደቸለሰወንድሙን' into 'እንደቸለሰ' and 'ወንድም'; and 'በነኦነግና' into 'ኦነግ' (preposition 'በነ' and conjunction 'ና' removed). Visual OCR corrections were applied to 'ተውስዷል' (corrected to 'ተወስዷል'), 'የሚሠልሉን' (corrected 'ሠ' to 'ሰ'), and 'የተፀነሰበትን' (corrected 'ፀ' to 'ጸ'). A scholarly guess was made for 'አክሳሪንት', which was corrected to 'አክሳሪነት' to form a semantically meaningful Amharic noun. 'የሃሎሔሽ' was treated as a proper noun/specific term, acknowledging potential OCR ambiguity (e.g., 'ሔ' vs 'ዊ'). All single-character words or roots were filtered out. summary: The input batch underwent a rigorous 8-protocol analysis. Protocol 1 (The Splitter) was applied to 'የእነወይዘሮ', 'የትኛውንና', and 'አገናኝና'. From 'የእነወይዘሮ', the core noun 'ወይዘሮ' was extracted, with the possessive prefix 'የእነ' discarded as per Protocol 2 (Nonsense Removal) and 7 (Size Constraint). Similarly, from 'የትኛውንና', 'የትኛውን' was extracted, and the single-character conjunction 'ና' was discarded. From 'አገናኝና', 'አገናኝ' was extracted, and 'ና' was discarded. Protocol 3 (The Corrector) addressed visual OCR confusions: 'በጐነጐኑት' was corrected to 'በጎነጎኑት' (ጐ -> ጎ), and 'ሳይሠጡ' was corrected to 'ሳይሰጡ' (ሠ -> ሰ). Protocol 4 (The Lemmatizer) identified the global citation form for all words. Protocol 5 (The Translator) provided comprehensive English synonyms. Protocol 6 (The Grammarian) assigned major Part of Speech categories. Protocol 7 (The Filter) ensured all included words were at least two characters long. Protocol 8 (Executive Summary) details these actions. A scholarly guess was made for 'ፈዲስ', interpreting it as a noun meaning 'abundance' due to its less common usage.

The input batch underwent a rigorous 8-protocol scholarly analysis. Several words were split to isolate core lexical units: 'ከአንሸብ' into 'አንሸብ', 'ደንጎራና' into 'ደንጎራ', 'ምክንያትከድርድሩ' into 'ምክንያት' and 'ድርድር', 'ታማኝነቱንና' into 'ታማኝነቱን', 'ወደመሸታና' into 'መሸታ', 'በፈቃዳችንና' into 'ፈቃድ', 'በነጥብና' into 'ነጥብ', 'ያማያስጠራጥር' into 'አያስጠራጥር', 'ከወንበዴ' into 'ወንበዴ', 'ወሰዷቸውቢሮ' into 'ወሰዷቸው' and 'ቢሮ', and 'እንዲያፍሩና' into 'እንዲያፍሩ'. Low-value functional words such as prepositions ('ከ', 'በ', 'ወደ') and conjunctions ('ና'), along with the filler 'ያማ', were discarded as they do not serve as primary dictionary entries. Scholarly guesses and corrections were applied to rectify common OCR errors: 'አንሸብ' was corrected to 'አንሸሽብ' (from መሸሽ), 'ትሩፋቶቿን' to 'ትርፋቶቿን' (from ትርፋት), 'እልቁንስ' to 'ይልቁንስ' (rather), 'ተዘገጃጅ' to 'ተዘጋጅ' (prepare), and 'ነኝጥ' to 'ነጥብ' (point), based on morphological patterns and contextual likelihood. 'ሊስማሊያ' was identified as a proper noun with a transliteration guess. All resulting words and their roots are at least two characters long, adhering to the size constraint.
